actions.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.

official_title: To award a Congressional Gold Medal to President Donald John Trump, to the United States Secret Service, and to its local law enforcement partners, in recognition of their dedication to protecting our constitutional republican form of government.
short_title: Congressional Gold Medal For Inspiring Great Heroism and Tenacity (FIGHT) Act

titles.title: Congressional Gold Medal For Inspiring Great Heroism and Tenacity (FIGHT) Act
Congressional Gold Medal For Inspiring Great Heroism and Tenacity (FIGHT) Act

To award a Congressional Gold Medal to President Donald John Trump, to the United States Secret Service, and to its local law enforcement partners, in recognition of their dedication to protecting our constitutional republican form of government.
